name: Spiced Rack of Lamb with Pomegranate Sauce

ingredients.item:
2 tsp cumin seeds
1 tsp coriander seeds
5 tbsp olive oil
1 tsp ground cumin
½ tsp ground cinnamon
½ tsp cayenne pepper
½ tsp ground ginger
½ tsp turmeric
pinch of ground nutmeg
2 racks of lamb, French trimmed
sea salt
ingredients.original:
2 tsp cumin seeds
1 tsp coriander seeds
5 tbsp olive oil
1 tsp ground cumin
½ tsp ground cinnamon
½ tsp cayenne pepper
½ tsp ground ginger
½ tsp turmeric
pinch of ground nutmeg
2 racks of lamb, French trimmed
sea salt

ingredients.item:
4 tbsp pomegranate molasses
100ml (3½fl oz) pomegranate juice
1 tbsp clear honey
2 tbsp syrupy balsamic vinegar
